conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Talked to my doctor about diet options -- keto, Mediterranean, and intermittent fasting all came up.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Keto sounds effective short term but I don't think I could sustain cutting carbs that hard long term.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Intermittent fasting fits my schedule okay but I get pretty irritable if I skip breakfast entirely.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to schedule my car for its annual inspection.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Mediterranean seems like the easiest to actually stick with, and my doctor specifically recommended it given my cholesterol numbers.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got the car inspection scheduled for next Tuesday.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Read up more on the Mediterranean approach, a lot of it is stuff I already mostly eat anyway.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still tempted by how fast people describe results from keto.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My sister's birthday is coming up, need to figure out a gift.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Talked to my doctor again and she reiterated Mediterranean was the best fit given my cholesterol and how sustainable it is long term.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Going with the Mediterranean approach. My doctor's recommendation given my cholesterol numbers, plus how sustainable it is long term, settled it over keto and fasting.

query: What eating plan did the user decide to follow?
